meaning: adj.硅藻的,硅藻土的,含硅藻的
examples: Diatomaceous earths are the skeletal remains of the tiny aquatic plants deposited centuries ago.
In this paper, the adsorption of diatomaceous earth which is applied to deodorized paper is determined.
Early cylinders were completely filled with a porous filler material consisting of diatomaceous earth, charcoal, asbestos, and cement.
Commercial preparations of diatomaceous earth did as well as the organophosphate in all cases bar one (a beetle called the lesser grain borer in sorghum).
Diatomaceous earth is a widespread mineral.
